data.title: Iran War Deepens China’s Dependence on the US for Niche Gas
data.description: China is set to import a record volume of US ethane this month as petrochemical producers seek alternative feedstocks for their operations after the war in the Middle East choked off crucial supplies.
data.keywords: China,Trade War,Iran,Middle East,WANHUA CHEMICAL GROUP CO -A,Generic 1st 'NG' Future,Beijing,Imports,Washington,CHINA PETROLEUM & CHEMICAL-H,markets
